techniques.evidence_quote: it appears that the attack was possible due to cybersecurity failures on Angel One's part rather than a hack of AWS's systems
some of Angel One's AWS resources were compromised
client information was compromised in a data breach involving its AWS account

attack_chain.description: Attacker gained unauthorized access to Angel One's AWS account, likely through compromised credentials or cybersecurity misconfigurations on Angel One's part, rather than exploiting AWS infrastructure itself.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: it appears that the attack was possible due to cybersecurity failures on Angel One's part rather than a hack of AWS's systems

attack_chain.description: Attacker accessed and collected client information stored within Angel One's AWS resources.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: some of Angel One's AWS resources were compromised

attack_chain.description: Exfiltrated client data was subsequently posted to the dark web, discovered by Angel One's dark web monitoring partner.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: received an email alert from a 'dark web monitoring partner' on February 27, regarding a 'data leakage post'

initial_access_vector: Unknown — likely compromised AWS credentials or misconfiguration attributed to cybersecurity failures on Angel One's part, not an AWS infrastructure hack
